'''Bobbie Goulding Jr.''' (born 4 March 1993) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who has played in the 2010s. He has played at club level for the [[Dewsbury Rams]], in the [[Super League]] for the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], in the [[Canterbury Cup NSW]] for the [[Newtown Jets]], and the [[Thatto Heath Crusaders]], as {{rlp|sh}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Genealogical information==
Bobbie Goulding Jr. is the son of the rugby league footballer and coach [[Bobbie Goulding]].<ref name="Bobbie Goulding jnr looks to succeed where dad failed">{{cite web|url=https://www.smh.com.au/sport/nrl/bobbie-goulding-jnr-looks-to-succeed-where-dad-failed-20140306-349iq.html|title=Bobbie Goulding jnr looks to succeed where dad failed|publisher=smh.com.au|date=6 March 2014|accessdate=1 January 2015}}</ref>
